title: alyssum repens f. molliusculum
intro: Alyssum repens f. molliusculum is a subspecies of the alyssum plant, typically known for its tiny white flowers and creeping habit. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of alyssum repens f. molliusculum include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and aiding in wound healing. Alyssum repens f. molliusculum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
